title: × elyhordeum kolymense
intro: × Elyhordeum kolymense, also known as a hybrid of Elymus and Hordeum species, is a type of grass that is native to the Kolyma River region in Russia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of × Elyhordeum kolymense include its ability to improve digestion, reduce stress, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use by making teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed orally to harness its health benefits.
